channel.title: MU — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MU (Micron Technology) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED MU (+250%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added MU in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: ADDED MU (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) added MU in Q4 2025 · 27.1% of portfolio. More Micron on the memory cycle.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Mohnish Pabrai)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED MU (+412%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added MU in Q3 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: David Tepper: TRIMMED MU (-39%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) trimmed MU in Q3 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: ADDED MU (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) added MU in Q3 2025 · 24.6% of portfolio. Micron cycle bet.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Mohnish Pabrai)

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED MU (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added MU in Q3 2025 · 7.4% of portfolio. Semi cycle bet.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Prem Watsa)
